title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-3, Mistral, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, list, copy, delete models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same verbs as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM, chat, or embeddings endpoint.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich, self-hosted ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama with multi-user support.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, reactive streaming, Android compatible.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; idiomatic Ruby wrappers for chat, generate, pull, etc.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive CLI with syntax highlighting, conversation history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a local GitHub Copilot alternative.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU & autoscaling support.

title: ollama-chat
summary: Minimal Next.js chat interface using Ollama and Tailwind; deploy with Vercel in one click.

title: ollama-spring-boot-starter
summary: Spring Boot auto-configuration exposing Ollama as REST/chat beans; inject and go.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation for Ollama; pin exact binary + CUDA versions reproducibly.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up Ollama in a container with chosen models for CI pipelines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing strongly-typed async client for the Ollama API.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-model-librarian
summary: CLI utility to batch download, tag, and prune Ollama models; great for air-gapped labs.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that lets you query local Ollama models from within your notes.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve deployment example showing how to horizontally scale Ollama models across GPUs.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot that chats with any Ollama model; supports group chats and voice replies.
